subject: MATHEMATICS
title: measure capacity in liters (L) and/or milliliters
objective: measure capacity in liters (L) and/or milliliters (mL), using appropriate measuring tools.
introduction: Ever wondered how we measure things, draw shapes, or count large numbers? 🤔 In 'measure capacity in liters (L) and/or', you'll discover the answer. Math is an adventure!

vocabulary.definition: Pag-alam ng laki, haba, o dami ng isang bagay.
